mission.title: localai: feat: Assistant API
mission.description: feat: Assistant API. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current localai deployment
steps.description:
Verify your localai version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
helm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working localai installation.

steps.title: Review localai configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant localai configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai
```
OpenAI released the Assistant API. https://platform.openai.com/docs/assistants/overview

This thread is to collect thoughts on how to integrate this - it seems we have already all the needed pieces, but it's needed to stich things together to expose

steps.title: Apply the fix for feat: Assistant API
steps.description:
This PR adds the [file upload apis](https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/files).

Part of https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI/issues/1273

Don't merge yet. Looking for issues and early reviews. Forgot to write tests, but it does work.

- [X] Yes, I signed my commits.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "feat: Assistant API" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Note: PR #1703 (mudler/LocalAI#1703) is a partial implementation covering file upload functionality only, not the full Assistant API. The complete Assistant API (threads, runs, messages) remains unimplemented. The realtime API implementation is tracked in the issue but no single merged PR was identified as the definitive fix. The referenced PR was incorrect — it addressed query parameter model detection rather than the realtime API. This issue remains open for community contribution.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible.
